user.title: Sports Live — Choose Sport
user.description: Select the sport you want to follow.

mode.description: Select what kind of sensor to create.

manual_team.title: Manual Team Entry
manual_team.description: Enter the ESPN team ID manually. Find the ID in the team URL on espn.com.

error.cannot_load_competitions: Could not load competitions from ESPN. Check your internet connection.
